data.caption: Figure 1: Runtime and memory of full self-attention and different implementations of Longformer’s self-attention; Longformer-loop is non-vectorized, Longformer-chunk is vectorized, and Longformer-cuda is a custom cuda kernel implementation. Longformer’s memory usage scales linearly with the sequence length, unlike the full self-attention mechanism that runs out of memory for long sequences on current GPUs. Different implementations vary in speed, with the vectorized Longformer-chunk being the fastest. More details are in section 3.2.

The text content from the image is:
